translated: Announcements from Love Live! Superstar!!.
First, some music news.
On Wednesday, July 8th, the Liella!
Musubu Project mini-album will be released.
We'll be releasing five versions: Original, Photo, Team Kids, Team Sports, and Team Green.
The Original, Team Kids, Team Sports, and Team Green editions feature new illustrations,
while the Photo edition features brand-new photos of the cast.
It'll include 4 songs, including a new group track, plus off-vocal versions for 8 tracks total.
First-press bonuses for the Original, Team Kids, Team Sports, and Team Green editions include member stickers.
The Photo edition will include a photo-booth style sticker.
All versions include a lottery application ticket for the Love Live! Series 15th Anniversary Love Live! Fes.
Plus, as a bundle purchase bonus, you'll receive
a Liella! sticker book.
Don't forget to pre-order!
To celebrate the release of the Liella!
Musubu Project mini-album, we'll be holding a special handover event.
It'll take place over two days: Friday, October 2nd and Friday, October 9th.
Customers who pre-order or purchase the mini-album
at participating stores will be entered into a lottery to attend the handover event.
The cast members vary by date, so please check the application details before applying.
Check the Love Live! Superstar!! official website for more details.
Next, news from the Love Live! Series Official Card Game.
The Liella!
Start Deck featuring only Liella! members and songs will be released on Saturday, May 30th.
This product will include a special rarity "Secret Serial" card with a serial number.
Each numbered card is a super-luxurious, one-of-a-kind item in the world.
The Start Deck has everything you need to play Loveca! right away, so if you haven't tried it yet, grab one and start playing.
Stay tuned for the latest updates on the official Love Live! website and official X account.
Now for some appearance info.
Starting April 1st, Liella!'s
ChuChu Liella!
Season 2 will begin airing on Nippon TV.
Haimashin No. 3 will continue as the program MC from Season 1.
Catch-up streaming will be available on TVer and Nittele Tada after the broadcast.
Be sure to check it out.
To commemorate the broadcast, the live concert Love Live! Superstar!! Liella!
no ChuChu Liella!
2026 will be held at LaLa arena TOKYO-BAY on August 1st and 2nd.
The second official lottery is open on Ticket Pia until 11:59 PM on Sunday, April 5th.
Please check that out as well.
For details on all the information shared today, please check the Liella!
official X account and the Love Live! Superstar!! official website.
